appName.description: The name of the extension displayed in the popup header.

statusActiveOne.description: Status bar text when replacements are enabled and there is exactly one mapping.

statusActiveOther.description: Status bar text when replacements are enabled and there are multiple mappings. The number is prepended by the app.

statusPaused.description: Status bar text when replacements are paused.

addMapping.description: Button label to submit a new pattern-to-label mapping.

patternPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the pattern input field when creating a mapping.

labelPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the label input field when creating a mapping.

patternRequired.description: Validation error shown when the pattern field is empty.

labelRequired.description: Validation error shown when the label field is empty.

patternExists.description: Validation error shown when a duplicate pattern is entered.

emptyStateTitle.description: Title shown when the mapping list is empty.

emptyStateDescription.message: Add a pattern above to get started
emptyStateDescription.description: Help text shown below the empty state title.

editMapping.description: Dialog title when editing an existing mapping.

editPatternPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the pattern input field when editing a mapping.

editLabelPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the label input field when editing a mapping.

save.description: Button label to save changes in a dialog.

cancel.description: Button label to dismiss a dialog without saving.

close.description: Accessible label for the close button on dialogs.

settings.description: Dialog title for the settings panel.

settingsSectionGeneral.description: Section header in the settings dialog.

settingsThemeDescription.description: Description text for the theme setting.

themeSystem.description: Theme option that follows the operating system preference.
